requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — GS/IEC 62133

summary.en: Ghana adopts international standards through the Ghana Standards Authority （GSA） as GS standards, which mirror IEC publications. For portable lithium cells and battery packs, the relevant safety reference is the GS adoption of IEC 62133-2 （safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries）. Where the product is within GSA conformity-assessment scope, the importer is expected to demonstrate conformity to the applicable GS/IEC 62133 standard, typically through testing reports and the GSA conformity-assessment / destination-inspection process. The standard covers abuse testing （overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge） and electrochemical safety, and a recognised IEC 62133-2 test report from an accredited laboratory is the usual evidentiary basis.
summary.zh: 加纳通过加纳标准局（GSA）将国际标准采用为GS标准，与IEC出版物保持一致。对于便携式锂电芯及电池组，相关安全依据为IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）的GS采用版本。当产品属于GSA合格评定范围时，进口商须证明符合适用的GS/IEC 62133标准，通常通过检测报告及GSA合格评定/到岸检验流程完成。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学安全，由认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2检测报告通常作为证据基础。
summary.zht: 迦納透過迦納標準局（GSA）將國際標準採用為GS標準，與IEC出版物保持一致。對於便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，相關安全依據為IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）的GS採用版本。當產品屬於GSA合格評定範圍時，進口商須證明符合適用的GS/IEC 62133標準，通常透過檢測報告及GSA合格評定/到岸檢驗流程完成。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學安全，由認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2檢測報告通常作為證據基礎。

standards_or_laws: GS adoption of IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems
GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection programme for regulated products

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 （safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）, supplemented by GB 18287-2013 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory evidences Chinese domestic compliance; because Ghana adopts the IEC text directly through GS standards, an IEC 62133-2 report is generally a closer fit than a GB 31241 report for GSA conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），并由GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池）补充。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告证明中国国内合规；由于加纳通过GS标准直接采用IEC文本，IEC 62133-2报告对GSA合格评定而言通常比GB 31241报告更为契合。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），並由GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池）補充。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告證明中國國內合規；由於迦納透過GS標準直接採用IEC文本，IEC 62133-2報告對GSA合格評定而言通常比GB 31241報告更為契合。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because Ghana adopts IEC 62133-2 directly as a GS standard, exporters should base safety evidence on IEC 62133-2 rather than on GB 31241 alone. Key gaps: (1) GB 31241 contains national deviations from IEC 62133-2 in test severity and acceptance criteria, so a GB-only report may not map cleanly onto the GS/IEC requirement; (2) GSA conformity assessment and destination inspection are import-side processes that a domestic Chinese certificate does not complete; (3) the importer of record, not the foreign manufacturer alone, typically carries the conformity demonstration to GSA. Existing GB 31241 reports can support engineering analysis but should be confirmed against the GS adoption of IEC 62133-2 used by GSA.
gap.zh: 由于加纳直接将IEC 62133-2采用为GS标准，出口商应以IEC 62133-2而非仅以GB 31241为安全证据基础。主要差距：（1）GB 31241在测试严苛程度和验收准则上与IEC 62133-2存在国家偏差，仅有GB报告可能无法清晰对应GS/IEC要求；（2）GSA合格评定与到岸检验属进口侧流程，中国国内证书无法完成；（3）通常由记录在案的进口商而非仅由境外制造商向GSA承担合规证明。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但应对照GSA所用的IEC 62133-2 GS采用版本予以确认。
gap.zht: 由於迦納直接將IEC 62133-2採用為GS標準，出口商應以IEC 62133-2而非僅以GB 31241為安全證據基礎。主要差距：（1）GB 31241在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則上與IEC 62133-2存在國家偏差，僅有GB報告可能無法清晰對應GS/IEC要求；（2）GSA合格評定與到岸檢驗屬進口側流程，中國國內證書無法完成；（3）通常由記錄在案的進口商而非僅由境外製造商向GSA承擔合規證明。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但應對照GSA所用的IEC 62133-2 GS採用版本予以確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — conformity to the GS adoption of IEC 62133-2 is expected for regulated lithium batteries, demonstrated through GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) — standards and conformity assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana adopts IEC 62133-2 as a GS standard, so portable lithium cells and packs in GSA scope should be evidenced against IEC 62133-2 and cleared through GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection. A Chinese GB 31241 report evidences domestic compliance but contains national deviations and does not by itself complete GSA acceptance, so exporters should prepare IEC 62133-2 testing and Ghana import-side conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳将IEC 62133-2采用为GS标准，因此属GSA范围的便携式锂电芯及电池组应以IEC 62133-2为证据基础，并通过GSA合格评定/到岸检验放行。中国GB 31241报告证明国内合规，但存在国家偏差，且本身不能完成GSA认可，故出口商应准备IEC 62133-2测试及加纳进口侧合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納將IEC 62133-2採用為GS標準，因此屬GSA範圍的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組應以IEC 62133-2為證據基礎，並透過GSA合格評定/到岸檢驗放行。中國GB 31241報告證明國內合規，但存在國家偏差，且本身不能完成GSA認可，故出口商應準備IEC 62133-2測試及迦納進口側合規證據。
